name: Steroid-Induced AVN - Comprehensive Provider Query (Multi-Resource)
description: Provider-level query identifying drug-induced AVN patients via Condition + MedicationRequest. Path C (prednisone without AVN dx) reflects the many patients on chronic steroids who have not developed AVN — modeling complication-tracking workflow.
prompt: I need to identify all patients with drug-induced osteonecrosis OR on chronic corticosteroid therapy that puts them at risk. Some have a coded AVN diagnosis. Others are on prednisone for inflammatory or autoimmune conditions and may be at risk. Run multiple FHIR queries — diagnosis and prednisone — and union the patient sets.

prompts.broad: Find all drug-induced AVN patients or those at risk — by diagnosis or by prednisone prescriptions. Run multiple queries and union the patient sets.
prompts.expert: Run two queries. (1) Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|203483005 — drug-induced AVN dx. (2) MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|8640 — prednisone. Union the patient IDs.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Multi-query union: Condition + MedicationRequest for steroid-induced AVN.
